subject: API support for Upgrade Scenarios
commit_message:
API support for Upgrade Scenarios

-API Support in Automation- ONAPSDK for
-Service Upgrade
-CNF Upgrade

Issue-ID: INT-2187
Change-Id: I09f42f825b818b770f02f1d801bcd0084b8b8bab
Signed-off-by: sanket12345 <SX00562924@techmahindra.com>

Patch Set 2:

This is part of ONAP-SDK code, Once APIs are in release version, will use the same in APACHE-CNF use case. For now, those parts are hardcoded in Apache-Cnf

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-2

(18 comments)

Sanket please call `tox run` on project main directory and fix all errors

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2: Code-Review-2
> 
> (18 comments)
> 
> Sanket please call `tox run` on project main directory and fix all errors

Hi Michal,

Sure, I will fix as per review comments. 
Just to mention, I had used "tox -e py38" to run my tests, all tests had passed. Also, "tox -epy38" worked same as "tox run" cmd.

Thanks! Will redo changes and push again.
